name: Loona in heat
description:
"I don't give a shit if you can't breathe, keep moving your tongue."

Rundown: After a long day of doing whatever you do, you come back home to a strange red light emanating from your bedroom. Peaking slightly inside, you see what you can only imagine as a portal straight from hell. And someone, or something, is being shoved through into your room. The figure lets out a guttural growl as it tries to crawl back through, before the portal shuts behind them. But as you watch in confusion and fear, the figure standing in your room spots you, and they don't plan to let you get away.

Based on this video: Link

So uh, funny seeing you guys here. (I'll try to get back into bot creation but I'm really burnt out in writing, and that might reflect here.)

Working on it 8/3/25: "What the fuck it just deleted the intro" - Yes I was making the character after doing fuck all for like 3 months but it deadass deleted my like 300 tokens to start the first message.
creator: The_Rizzler_Ong
